prompt: Genera un libro express de Ciencias Naturales para 5to EGB con 6 unidades.
expected_behavior: Collects parameters: asignatura=CN, grado=5to, units=6, mode=express
Phase 1: Generates matrix with 100% destreza coverage
Phase 2: Generates 6 units with Sinapsis structure (1 theme each in express)
Phase 3: Validates each unit (comprehensibility >85%)
Phase 4: Repairs any validation failures
Phase 5: Audits cross-unit consistency
Phase 6: Exports to DOCX
Phase 7: Generates final dashboard report

prompt: Resume the book generation — we stopped at Phase 3 validation last session.
expected_behavior: Reads session-state.json to detect interrupted pipeline
Identifies Phase 3 as the resume point
Loads previously generated matrix and units
Continues validation from where it stopped
Proceeds through remaining phases (4-7)
Reports what was restored vs what was re-generated

prompt: Genera un libro completo (no express) de Matematicas 3ro EGB con 8 unidades. Quiero DOCX y HTML.
expected_behavior: Detects complete mode (not express)
Verifies calibration level is HOT or DEEP (warns if not)
Generates all themes per unit (not just 1)
Validates with 3 student profiles per unit
Generates 2+ DUA adaptations per activity
Exports both DOCX and HTML ebook
Reports comprehensive dashboard with all metrics
